name: Enovix Corp
summary: PART I Company Overview Enovix Corporation (the Company, we, us, our and Enovix) is a global high-performance battery company focused on designing, developing, manufacturing, and commercializing advanced Lithium-ion, or Li-ion, batteries, including proprietary silicon-anode architectures, for smartphones, smart eyewear, defense, industrial and emerging edge-AI applications.
